Dialog.name: TRL_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}When Aigis fires one of her weapons, an enemy a certain distance in front of her will be automatically targeted.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 44}An auto-targeted unit will be indicated with a target mark. You will have greater precision when firing at these enemies.[n]{f 1 1}
